---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Zero
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is Your Feature Request Related to a Problem?

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve. For example: "I find it frustrating when I have to..."

## Describe the Solution You Would Like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Be as specific as possible — include how you imagine interacting with the feature (e.g. a new command, a Settings option, a UI element).

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have already considered and why they fall short.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, screenshots, or references that help explain the feature request.
